zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Murdac於大約1130年出生在英國奧可福爾鮑頓 波格斯時，她的父親Ralph Murdac36歲，母親Beatrice de Chesney17歲。她於1161年與John de Eyncourt在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1227年在英國林可爾史爾享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Murdac于大约1130年出生在英国奧可福爾鮑頓 波格斯时，她的父亲Ralph Murdac36岁，母亲Beatrice de Chesney17岁。她于1161年与John de Eyncourt在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1227年在英国林可爾史爾享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Murdac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Murdoch
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal names Muireadhach ‘mariner’, Murchadh ‘sea-warrior’, and Muircheartach ‘sea-ruler’, the first element in each being muir ‘sea’. The personal name was introduced into Yorkshire and Normandy by Norsemen from Ireland as early as the 10th century. The surname in post-Conquest medieval England usually belongs to Norman families.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Murdac was born about 1130, in Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Ralph Murdac, was 36 and her mother, Beatrice de Chesney, was 17. She married John de Eyncourt in 1161, in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1227, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Murdac est née environ 1130, à Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Murdac, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Chesney, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John d’Eyncourt en 1161, à Branston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1227, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Murdac um 1130 in Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Murdac 36 und ihre Mutter Beatrice de Chesney 17. Sie hat 1161 in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom John de Eyncourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1227 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Murdac è nata il circa 1130 nel Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Ralph Murdac, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Beatrice de Chesney, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John de Eyncourt nel 1161, nel Branston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1227, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Murdacが約1130年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアブロウトン ポググズで生まれた時，父Ralph Murdacは36歳，母Beatrice de Chesneyは17歳であった。1161年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランストンでJohn de Eyncourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1227年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Murdac(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 스퍼드실르 브루그h턴 포그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Murdac(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Chesney(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1161년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 브랜스턴에서 John de Eyncourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1227년 영국 링코실르에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Murdac nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Murdac, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Chesney, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Eyncourt em 1161, em Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1227, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Murdac родилась около 1130 г. в местности броугтон погс, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Murdac было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Chesney, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Eyncourt в 1161 г. в местности бранстон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1227 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 99 лет.

Se casó con John de Eyncourt en 1161, en Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1227, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 99 años.
